creator: keramida@ceid.upatras.gr
text:
On 2007-02-05 13:45, "Max N. Boyarov" <m.boyarov@bsd.by> wrote:
> For me it also works,
> but file DOC-22.0.93.2 is present in pkg-plist,
> and is not present in emacs-22.0.93.tar.gz
> built with WITHOUT_GTK=yes

Exactly.  I am trying to find out why the pkg-plist creation doesn't
really work as before.

Since this is a minor bug, which doesn't cause important failures,
I think I'll ask anray@ to review the patch and commit it; then while
users have a chance to use the pretest version of Emacs, I can work
on fixing the plist.
